executive_verdict.primary_failure_mode: A full-contract marketing loop could be declared healthy even when its independent verification artifact predated newer repaired runtime evidence.
executive_verdict.most_urgent_fix: Keep full-contract verifier gates fail-closed against newer runner/audit artifacts so no repaired loop can self-certify on stale independent proof.

audit_metadata.scheduler_inspection_method: direct `openclaw cron list --json` because the in-tool cron API is restricted inside this cron-run context

owns: bounded timeout reruns and timeout tuning
syncing research artifacts into the git repo

findings.title: Marketing full-contract verification could pass on stale independent proof after newer runtime repairs
findings.mechanism: The marketing verifier only checked age and pass/fail of `marketing_loop_independent_verification.json`, so a runner-triggered repair at 2026-05-22T00:57:25+02:00 could still be certified by independent proof from 2026-05-22T00:27:28+02:00.
findings.root_cause: The verifier gate lacked coherence checks against newer runner, momentum, and workflow-audit artifacts.
findings.recommended_fix: Require the marketing verifier to fail closed when independent verification predates newer runtime evidence, then rerun independent verification after any material repair.

findings.title: Shared market-intelligence reuse is still partly prompt-enforced instead of runtime-enforced
findings.mechanism: The shared artifact declares intended downstream consumers including `reddit_monitor.py`, `run.py`, the Ralph-Site owner loop, and this watchdog, but direct code-level consumption was only evident in `competitor_analysis.py` and `run.py`; other paths currently rely on cron prompt instructions to read the artifact.
findings.root_cause: Cross-loop reuse expectations are documented well, but not yet backed by uniform script-level proof hooks across every intended consumer.
findings.recommended_fix: Add lightweight runtime proof that each intended consumer loaded or consciously skipped the shared market-intelligence artifact, instead of relying only on prompt prose.

findings.title: Retired docs and reflection jobs are disabled and clearly marked as legacy rather than live authority
findings.mechanism: Disabled topology is still present for audit history, but the payloads and descriptions explicitly identify them as non-live legacy surfaces.
findings.root_cause: Legacy retention is being handled explicitly rather than silently.
findings.recommended_fix: Keep disabled legacy jobs explicitly labeled and non-authoritative so stale topology cannot regain silent ownership.

ordered_fix_plan.goal: Fail closed when independent verification is older than repaired marketing runtime evidence
ordered_fix_plan.why_now: This was a real hidden self-certification gap on a live full-contract loop.
ordered_fix_plan.expected_effect: Same-run repairs now require fresh independent proof before the marketing path can be called healthy.

ordered_fix_plan.goal: Add runtime-level consumption proof for shared market-intelligence artifacts
ordered_fix_plan.why_now: Cross-loop learning should be provable behavior, not just prompt intent.
ordered_fix_plan.expected_effect: Cleaner evidence that competitor/reddit/positioning learnings are actually reused by the loops that should act on them.

ordered_fix_plan.goal: Keep disabled topology explicitly retired and out of active ownership reasoning
ordered_fix_plan.why_now: That remains the main protection against stale loop leakage returning through old scheduler surfaces.
ordered_fix_plan.expected_effect: Lower risk of retired jobs or prompts silently regaining authority.

repairs_applied_this_run.change: Added a runtime-coherence gate so the verifier fails if `marketing_loop_independent_verification.json` predates newer runner, momentum, or workflow-audit artifacts.
Reran the independent marketing verifier after the repaired runtime proof gate so the full-contract path has fresh post-repair signoff.

independent_verification.summary: The repaired marketing verifier first failed closed against stale proof, then passed only after a fresh independent marketing verification was produced at 2026-05-22T01:09:25.420760+02:00. A fresh loop-integrity run then returned `MARKETING_LOOP_OK`.

highest_risk_unresolved_issue.title: Shared market-intelligence consumption is not uniformly runtime-proven across every intended consumer
highest_risk_unresolved_issue.why: The architecture now blocks stale independent certification on the repaired marketing path, but cross-loop learning reuse is still partially enforced by prompt prose rather than uniform script-level proof.
